# Pencheff

> Pencheff is an open-source, all-in-one security platform — free and self-hostable under the MIT licence. It unifies DAST, SAST, VAPT, API security, CNAPP (KSPM/KIEM/CWPP/ASPM), AI/LLM red teaming, SBOM, IaC scanning, and compliance mapping into one workflow that produces audit-grade evidence.

Pencheff is for engineers, security teams, and auditors who want manual-grade penetration testing and code/supply-chain analysis without stitching together a dozen tools. Every shipped feature is free; the whole platform is on GitHub and runs as a Docker Compose stack inside your own boundary.

## What Pencheff is

- **Open source**: MIT-licensed, source on GitHub, self-hostable. No licence fee, no seat limits, no feature gating.
- **All-in-one**: one platform for dynamic testing (DAST), static analysis (SAST), penetration testing (VAPT), API security, cloud posture (CNAPP), AI/LLM security, software composition analysis (SCA), SBOM, IaC, and compliance.
- **Evidence-first**: every finding ships with request/response proof, CVSS scoring, and remediation guidance; reports map to OWASP Top 10, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, and HIPAA.

## Core capabilities

- [Web DAST](https://pencheff.com/platform/web-dast): authenticated crawling, API discovery, active exploitation, and exploit chains — full OWASP Top 10 coverage.
- [SAST & secrets](https://pencheff.com/platform/sast-and-secrets): static analysis across 15+ languages, secrets detection, and dependency/SCA advisories.
- [LLM red team](https://pencheff.com/platform/llm-red-team): OWASP LLM Top 10 attack modules, jailbreak corpora, prompt-injection and agent testing.
- [Cloud & infrastructure](https://pencheff.com/platform/cloud-and-infrastructure): KSPM/KIEM/CWPP/ASPM, IaC misconfiguration, container image scanning, subdomain takeover.
- [Audit & compliance](https://pencheff.com/platform/audit-and-compliance): framework-mapped, audit-ready DOCX/PDF reports.
- [Methodology v4.2](https://pencheff.com/platform/methodology-v4-2): the adversarial assessment standard Pencheff runs.

## Key facts

- License: MIT (open source). Self-hostable via Docker Compose.
- Price: free.
- Categories: DAST, SAST, VAPT / penetration testing, API security testing, CNAPP, AI/LLM red teaming, SCA, SBOM, IaC scanning, vulnerability scanning, compliance reporting.
- Site: https://pencheff.com
- App: https://app.pencheff.com
- Docs: https://docs.pencheff.com
